results.title: Why Did Paresh Rawal Claim OMG 2 Was His Idea All Along
results.description: Paresh Rawal recently stated that the core concept of OMG 2 was originally his idea. We analyze the evolution of the Bollywood script, the casting shift, and why idea ownership in cinema is complex.

results.title: ILT20 2027 Schedule, Fixtures: International League T20 2027 Match Time Table, Venue
results.description: Get the UAE's International League T20 2027 Schedule along with ILT20 2027 Full Fixtures, Match Time Table and Venue details only on Indiacricketschedule.com The UAE's International League T20 (ILT20) 2027 (known as the UAE T20 League 2027 , DP World ILT20 2027 ) will be held in Jan and Feb 2027, a Twenty20 cricket league organized by the Emirates Cricket Board (ECB). [1] The season 4 of the International League T20 (ILT20) is scheduled to begin from December 2026 to January 2027. The fourth season of the International T20 League will begin on December 2026, the UAE National Day," the organisers announced on Wednesday. The six-team, 34-match tournament is set to conclude with the final on January 2027. The 2027 International League T20's Player Auction for Season 5 will be held on September 30 in Dubai.
